title: Production Supervisor, Aligner
description:
**Date:** Jul 9, 2026


**Location:** Badia Polesine (RO), IT, 45021


**Company:** Dentsply Sirona, Inc


**Requistion ID**: 83752  


  

Dentsply Sirona is the world’s largest manufacturer of professional dental products and technologies, with over a century of innovation and service to the dental industry and patients worldwide. Dentsply Sirona develops, manufactures, and markets a comprehensive solutions offering including dental and oral health products as well as other consumable medical devices under a strong portfolio of world class brands.  



Dentsply Sirona’s products provide innovative, high\-quality, and effective solutions to advance patient care and deliver better and safer dental care. Dentsply Sirona’s headquarter is located in Charlotte, North Carolina. The company’s shares are listed in the United States on NASDAQ under the symbol XRAY. Visit www.dentsplysirona.com for more information about Dentsply Sirona and its products.  



  

For our manufacturing site in Badia Polesine (RO), we are looking for a:  


**Production Supervisor**  


**Key Responsibilities**
* Ensure achievement of safety, quality, productivity, and efficiency targets and KPIs.
* Act as the designated safety supervisor in compliance with Italian Health \& Safety regulations.
* Lead, organize, and supervise production activities, ensuring the availability of personnel, materials, equipment, and tools.
* Manage and develop the production team through effective communication, training, performance management, and employee engagement.
* Ensure compliance with work orders and product specifications.
* Promote a culture of continuous improvement and actively support related initiatives.
* Identify and report equipment issues, process improvements, and resource needs.
* Collaborate closely with the Manufacturing Manager and cross\-functional teams to ensure operational excellence.

  


**Requirements**
* Strong alignment with company values: Respect, Responsibility, Collaboration, Reliability, and Agility.
* Proven leadership skills with the ability to motivate, coach, and manage team performance.
* Strong organizational and problem\-solving capabilities, with a results\-oriented mindset.
* Excellent communication and collaboration skills across departments and functions.
* Ability to make sound decisions, assess risks, and escalate issues when appropriate.
* Openness to feedback and commitment to continuous learning and improvement.
* Experience in manufacturing or production environments, preferably in a supervisory role.

  


**What We Offer**

You will join an international and stimulating environment that promotes professional growth and development.

We offer a permanent employment contract under the Italian Chemical Industry Collective Labor Agreement (CCNL Industria Chimica), with a gross annual salary ranging from €33,000 to €40,000, commensurate with your experience and qualifications.

Our benefits package includes lunch\-related agreements with local restaurants and partners, a partnership with a CAF (Tax Assistance Center) for annual tax return preparation, and access to flexible working arrangementsand smart working opportunities.
**\#LI\-IC1**  

  

**Equal Opportunity Employer:** Dentsply Sirona is an Equal Opportunity Employer. All qualified applicants will be considered without unlawful discrimination or regard for race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, sexual or gender identity, national or ethnic origin, age, marital status, disability, genetic factors, military and veteran status, or any other characteristics protected by applicable local law.
**Eligibility:** All successful applicants must be eligible to work in the country the position is based.
**Assistance:** If you need assistance with completing the online application due to a disability, please send an accommodation request to accommodationrequest@dentsplysirona.com.
**Agencies:** Please note that Dentsply Sirona does not accept or respond to unsolicited requests or applications submitted by Recruitment Agencies/ Search Firms.
**Notice on Fraudulent Job Offers:** Unfortunately, we are aware of third parties that pretend to represent our company offering unauthorized employment opportunities. If you think a fraudulent source is offering you a job, please have a look at the following information: careers.dentsplysirona.com.

description:

Dentsply Sirona is the world’s largest manufacturer of professional dental products and technologies, with over a century of innovation and service to the dental industry and patients worldwide. Dentsply Sirona develops, manufactures, and markets a comprehensive solutions offering including dental and oral health products as well as other consumable medical devices under a strong portfolio of world class brands.  



Dentsply Sirona’s products provide innovative, high\-quality, and effective solutions to advance patient care and deliver better and safer dental care. Dentsply Sirona’s headquarter is located in Charlotte, North Carolina. The company’s shares are listed in the United States on NASDAQ under the symbol XRAY. Visit www.dentsplysirona.com for more information about Dentsply Sirona and its products.  



  

**For our manufacturing site in Badia Polesine (RO), we are looking for a:**  


**Technical Writer**  



In this role, you will serve as the focal point for the creation and management of technical documentation related to our medical devices. As part of the **Research \& Development** team and reporting to the **Product Development Engineer**, you will help ensure that technical information is clear, accurate, and compliant with regulatory requirements throughout the entire product lifecycle.  


**Responsibilities**
* Prepare, update, and organize technical documentation for medical devices in compliance with applicable regulations, with a particular focus on **FDA registrations and submissions**.
* Collaborate with the R\&D laboratory team to collect and formalize technical data and experimental results for the preparation of laboratory activity reports and technical documentation.
* Work closely with different company departments to support project\-related activities, with a focus on the **U.S. market** and **Private Label customer products**.
* Ensure proper traceability, control, and archiving of all technical documentation.

  


**Requirements**
* Alignment with company values of **Respect** (for company standards, vision, colleagues, customers, processes, and work instructions), **Accountability**, **Collaboration**, **Reliability**, and **Agility** (continuous improvement).
* Bachelor's degree or equivalent qualification in a scientific field (Chemistry, Industrial Chemistry, Pharmaceutical Chemistry and Technology, or related disciplines).
* Strong teamwork and collaboration skills.
* Good command of written and spoken English.
* Proficiency in Microsoft Office and general computer applications.
* Excellent organizational skills and strong attention to detail.

  

  

**Equal Opportunity Employer:** Dentsply Sirona is an Equal Opportunity Employer. title: R&D Product Development Engineer
description:
**Date:** Jul 10, 2026


**Location:** Badia Polesine (RO), IT, 45021


**Company:** Dentsply Sirona, Inc


**Requistion ID**: 83764  


  

Dentsply Sirona is the world’s largest manufacturer of professional dental products and technologies, with over a century of innovation and service to the dental industry and patients worldwide. Dentsply Sirona develops, manufactures, and markets a comprehensive solutions offering including dental and oral health products as well as other consumable medical devices under a strong portfolio of world class brands.  



Dentsply Sirona’s products provide innovative, high\-quality, and effective solutions to advance patient care and deliver better and safer dental care. Dentsply Sirona’s headquarter is located in Charlotte, North Carolina. The company’s shares are listed in the United States on NASDAQ under the symbol XRAY. Visit www.dentsplysirona.com for more information about Dentsply Sirona and its products.  



  

For our manufacturing site in Badia Polesine (RO), we are looking for a:  


**R\&D Product Development Engineer**  



As part of the **Research \& Development** team, you will play a key role in the development of new silicone formulations for medical devices intended for international markets. You will be involved in laboratory activities, performance testing, and stability studies, while also contributing to the preparation of the technical and regulatory documentation required for FDA registration processes and the development of Private Label products. Working closely with cross\-functional teams, you will support innovation and contribute to the success of our product development projects.  


**Responsibilities**
* Carry out product and material development activities, ensuring the continuous improvement of existing products while meeting commercial launch timelines.
* Coordinate and manage product development activities, from the concept phase through to production support during the scale\-up process from laboratory to manufacturing.
* Participate in the creation and maintenance of bills of materials (BOMs), work instructions, and production specifications.
* Collaborate with suppliers in the qualification of new raw materials and components.
* Ensure technical compliance, product quality, and adherence to regulatory and market requirements.
* Provide the R\&D Documentation Specialist with data and reports required for the preparation of product technical documentation.
* Identify root causes of non\-conformities and propose appropriate corrective actions.

  


**Requirements**
* Bachelor's degree in a scientific discipline such as Chemistry, Industrial Chemistry, Pharmaceutical Chemistry and Technology (CTF), or a related field.
* Strong analytical, problem\-solving, and decision\-making skills.
* Results\-oriented mindset and ability to work effectively toward objectives.
* Agility and intellectual curiosity, with a genuine interest in change, innovation, and continuous learning.
* Strong teamwork and collaboration skills.
* Good command of written and spoken English.
* Proficiency in Microsoft Office and general computer applications.
* Alignment with the company values of **Respect** (for company standards, vision, colleagues, customers, processes, and work instructions), **Accountability**, **Collaboration**, **Reliability**, and **Agility** (continuous improvement).

title: HSE Plant Specialist
description:
**Company Description**  

Founded in 1825, Bormioli Pharma has been a leading manufacturer of primary packaging for the pharmaceutical industry, offering complete solutions ranging from glass and plastic bottles to plastic and aluminum closures and accessories. As of December 2024, Bormioli Pharma has been fully integrated into the Gerresheimer Group and no longer operates as a standalone brand. Today, its portfolio, expertise, and capabilities continue within Gerresheimer, an innovative systems and solutions provider and a global partner to the pharma, biotech, and cosmetics sectors. The Group offers a comprehensive range of drug containment solutions, closures and accessories, drug delivery systems, medical devices, and health\-related solutions. Gerresheimer operates more than 40 production sites across 16 countries in Europe, the Americas, and Asia, and employs approximately 13,600 people worldwide. Discover all of Gerresheimer’s innovative solutions and stay up to date by visiting Gerresheimer’s website and LinkedIn page.

 **Job Description**  

The resource, within the HSE department at the Bergantino (RO) plant, will be responsible for the following activities:

* Manage on\-site waste handling activities and carrying out periodic compliance inspections.
* Organize and maintain environmental sampling activities, including water, air emissions, noise, waste, and workplace environmental monitor
* Assist in the implementation and maintenance of the ISO 14001 Environmental Management System and the ISO 45001 Occupational Health and Safety Management System.
* Support the plant in the preparation and management of DUVRI (Interference Risk Assessment Documents for contractors and external companies) and DVR.

  

**Qualifications**  

* Some years of experience in HSE activities within structured and manufacturing companies
* Good knowledge of English language, written and spoken
* Excellent knowledge of MS Office
* Team\-working, organization, punctuality

  

**Additional Information**  

Gross Annual Salary range: 30\.000€ \- 40\.000€
company_description: Gerresheimer is the global partner for pharmaceutics, biotech, healthcare, and cosmetics with a very broad product range for pharmaceutical and cosmetic packaging solutions and drug delivery systems.

title: JUNIOR BUSINESS PARTNER & ANALIST - Healthcare RWE
description:
**Description:**
----------------


Il nostro cliente è una società di Bologna specializzata in progetti di Outcome Research e analisi di dati Real World Evidence (RWE) in ambito sanitario e farmaceutico. La società supporta multinazionali farmaceutiche e istituzioni nel dimostrare l'efficacia reale delle terapie attraverso l'economia sanitaria (HEOR).



Per supportare la direzione nella gestione strategica dei clienti e nello sviluppo dei progetti, selezioniamo un/a Junior Business Partner.



La persona selezionata lavorerà in strettissimo affiancamento alla direzione, acquisendo rapidamente una visione a 360° del business e dei progetti.



Le attività principali includeranno:


* Gestione della Clientela \& Account Management: Partecipare agli incontri con i clienti insieme al Direttore, intercettare le loro esigenze e preparare le proposte progettuali.
* Project Management \& Delivery: Monitorare lo stato di avanzamento dei progetti scientifici ed economici, garantendo il rispetto delle scadenze e la qualità del lavoro.
* Analisi e Sintesi di Business: Supportare la redazione di report, presentazioni strategiche e documenti legati alle progettualità.
* Approfondimento verticale: Studiare, appassionarsi e formarsi costantemente sulle dinamiche della Real World Evidence e dell'economia sanitaria.

  


**Requirements:**
-----------------


Questa opportunità è aperta sia a profili con background economico/scientifico, sia a laureati/e in discipline umanistiche (filosofia, lettere, scienze politiche) dotati di spiccata attitudine logica e quantitativa. Ci piacerebbe entrare in contatto con profili che possiedono:


* Spirito critico e logica: Capacità di analizzare scenari complessi, sintetizzare informazioni e proporre soluzioni con autonomia di giudizio.
* Approccio economico/business: Una naturale propensione a comprendere i meccanismi di valore e di mercato, anche senza una formazione economica formale.
* Forte curiosità intellettuale: Voglia di studiare e appassionarsi a un settore tecnico e stimolante come quello dei dati sui farmaci.
* Standing e doti relazionali: Capacità di relazionarsi con figure di alto livello (Direttori Medici, divisioni mediche, C\-Level farmaceutici) con professionalità, precisione ed empatia.


Sede di lavoro: Bologna con possibilità di trasferte su territorio nazionale



Orario: full\-time / 9\-18



Proponiamo inserimento diretto in azienda, contratto di assunzione in un ambiente di lavoro flessibile, intellettualmente stimolante e orientato alla crescita.
